message:
fix(ssh): cap poll backoff at 2 seconds and fix zero-length read on full buffer

sessioninner.rs:
- Extract INITIAL_POLL_DELAY (100ms) and MAX_POLL_DELAY (2s) constants,
  capping the exponential backoff that previously could grow unbounded
  and cause multi-second stalls in the SSH session loop
- Add next_poll_delay() helper with the backoff cap
- Fix read_into_buf: when buf.len() == buf.capacity(), the old code
  would resize to capacity (no-op) and then issue a zero-length read,
  which some Read implementations interpret as EOF — now properly
  reserves additional space before reading, preventing spurious channel
  teardown
- Add writable-bytes calculation that respects MAX_DESCRIPTOR_BUF_SIZE
- Import sorting (rustfmt)
- Add tests for backoff capping and read-into-full-buffer growth

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
